full_text:
Tissue was finely minced in a sterile petri dish. Then, it was dissociated in 20 mL of Dispase + RQ1-RNAse free DNAse diluted in AdDF+++ medium according to the protocol.

Final pellet was resuspended in 4 mL of organoid culture medium

Cell count 1):

total: 10.9 E6

live: 8.35 E6

viability: 76.8 %

Size: 7.0 um

Cell count 2):

total: 11.2 E6

live: 7.92 E6

viability: 70.6 %

Size: 6.8 um

Average cell count: 11.05 E6 / mL

Total volume: 4 mL

Final cell count: 44.2 E6 cells

A) Drug treatment for IF in 384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = __ wells were plated with cells.

384 wells x 20 µl = 7680 µl

prepare the mix for 384 wells 1000 cells/µl = 7.7E6 cells needed in total

→ make 4 x of 920 µl omegel plus cells mixture  in a 1.5 ml tube, and 1000 ul medium in a reservoir

→ 1000 cells/µl*7680 ul= 7.7 E6 divided into 4 tubes= 1.9 E6 per tube

volume to take from cell suspension (µl) for 920 ul of omentum gel mix *4 tubes

Cells →  428 µl

Culture medium →338   µl

Ome-gel       →    130         µl

Aprotinin     →   3.0         µl

Thrombin    →    3.0         µl

Fibrinogen  →    18.4         µl

NOTE: Fibrinogen should be added just before pipetting to the wells. So, add everything to all 4 tubes except Fibrinogen. When you are ready to pipette add Fibrinogen one by one to each tube.

Remaining (extra)mix from last tube was plated into 48 well plate *20 wells/40ul/well for scRNAseq of control samples

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

B) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Two vials with 1E6 cells each were collected. One was used as unstained control, and the other one was stained with the antibodies from the drug testing panel according to the protocol.

C) Sample for cryo

→ 6 vials of 0.5E6 cells in 1 mL of STEM CELL BANKER were frozen for scRNAseq.

→ 8 vials of 2.0E6 cells in 1 mL of STEM CELL BANKER were frozen.

Prepare mL of iPDC medium with cytokines

For 384 wells 25ul*384=9.6 ml

Total medium prepared: 40ml

plate (1): For IF drug treatments

Protocol with the drug dispensing details is available at: P:\h345\afarkkilab\Projects\iPDC\Drug testing

Under the name: Patient drug printing protocol_S351_rLN_29November_2023.tdd

Next day:

Cultures:

Cultures had some healthy-looking multicellular clusters. Not many in comparison to a culture set up from an omentum sample, but still enough to proceed with the drug testing experiment. Some debris also, but not too much to harm the cultures. It was also noticed that the last columns of wells in the plate contained less cells than the first ones. Most likely this was due to solidification of the omentum gel in the reservoir and, because of that, a non-homogeneous distribution of cells in the reimagining fluid that was plated.

Treatment:

The treatments were dispensed using the D300e drug dispenser and the stocks were prepared according to the following calculations:

First, a 0.75% Tween-20 in 1X sterile PBS was prepared first. Inside the TC hood 75uL of 100% Tween-20 were added into 10mL of 1X sterile PBS. This solution was used to prepare the Pembrolizumab, Tiragolumab, and Cisplatin stocks in a final concentration of 0.3% Tween-20 in 1X sterile PBS.

Pembrolizumab was freshly diluted to 3.0 mg/ mL in 0.3% Tween-20:

Pembrolizumab A2005, LOT 5 (Sellechkem), stock concentration 6.1 mg/mL

To prepare 3 mg/mL Pembrolizumab in 20 ul of 0.3% tween-20: take 9.8 uL of 6.1 mg/mL stock Pembrolizumab + 10.8 uL of 0.75% tween 20 1xPBS

anti-TIGIT was freshly diluted to 2.5mg/mL in 0.3% Tween-20:

Anti-TIGIT stock 4.1 mg/mL

To prepare 2.5 mg/mL anti-TIGIT, in 20 uL of 0.3% tween-20: take 12,1 uL of stock anti-TIGIT + 7.9 uL of 0.75% tween 20 PBS.

Cisplatin was diluted to 4.4 mM in 0.3% Tween-20:

10 mg of Cisplatin were diluted into 5 mL pre-warmed sterile water (50 deg) for a final concentration of 6.6 mM.

To prepare 4mM stock, take 12,1 uL of 6.6 mM + 7.9 uL of 0.75% tween 20 1xPBS

Dilute WEE1i and ATRi to 100uM in DMSO from 1mM stock

1mM stock = 1 uL of 10 mM ATRi / WEE1i + 9 uL of DMSO

Day 4 culture end point

On day 4 of culture (day 3 of drug treatment) cultures from 384 well plates were stained with live/dead marker followed by fixation in 4%PFA according to the protocol and stored at +4.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
